---
title: "Referencias"
---

Finch-Savage, W. E., & Leubner-Metzger, G. (2006). Seed dormancy and the control of germination. New Phytologist, 171(3), 501–523. [DOI: 10.1111/j.1469-8137.2006.01787.x](DOI: 10.1111/j.1469-8137.2006.01787.x)

Baskin, C. C., & Baskin, J. M. (2014). Seeds: Ecology, Biogeography, and Evolution of Dormancy and Germination (2nd ed.). Academic Press. [DOI: 10.1016/C2013-0-00597-X](DOI: 10.1016/C2013-0-00597-X)
